_comment: Mutation testing reruns the suite once per mutant. The shader-validity
harness launches a browser and a GPU device in afterAll, which takes the
suite from 0.3s to 14s — untenable across a thousand mutants — so it is
That means the score measures the *assertions* only. Since those are
mostly substring matches, and since the shader validation is what caught
most of the real bugs on this branch, treat a surviving mutant as a
question — would the validator have killed it? — rather than a verdict.
